response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and web engineer with a strong TypeScript/Node.js background, but he is a poor fit for this role. His C++ exposure is minimal—roughly six months at National Instruments writing components for an IDE, with no sustained Windows-platform C++ development. He has no SQL Server or Oracle experience, no fixed income or capital markets domain knowledge, and no exposure to the financial-systems tooling (Summit, Kafka, MQ) the role targets. His finance-adjacent stint at RIDE Capital involved modern web tooling rather than capital-markets systems, which does not meet the domain requirement.
strengths: Strong CI/CD and DevOps background, including GitLab, Docker, and containerised deployments
Breadth of industry exposure (fintech, ad-tech, GIS, embedded) demonstrates adaptability
Some Java experience alongside scripting knowledge, partially overlapping optional desirable skills
concerns: C++ experience is limited to approximately six months; nowhere near the 5–10 years required
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is primarily MongoDB and MySQL
Zero fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain knowledge
